name: kubevirt_handler
explanation: Mirrors kubevirt_controller: the check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and scrapes the KubeVirt Handler (`virt-handler`) DaemonSet pod's `/metrics` endpoint on a fixed path. Recommended autodiscovery uses `https://%%host%%:%%port%%/metrics`. `kube_namespace`/`kube_pod_name` are template-variable tag inputs, not discovery inputs. No user credentials are needed (TLS verify typically off). Canonical OpenMetrics port-scan.
notes: No on-disk auto_conf.yaml; pod-annotation autodiscovery in the README covers the canonical case.
